% https://q.uiver.app/#
\documentclass[tikz]{standalone}
\usepackage{quiver}
\begin{document}
\begin{tikzcd}[ampersand replacement=\&]
	\textcolor{rgb,255:red,92;green,92;blue,214}{{HG(X)}} \&\& \textcolor{rgb,255:red,92;green,92;blue,214}{{HF(X)}} \& \\
	\& \textcolor{rgb,255:red,214;green,92;blue,92}{{KG(X)}} \&\& \textcolor{rgb,255:red,214;green,92;blue,92}{{KF(X)}} \\
	\textcolor{rgb,255:red,92;green,92;blue,214}{{HG(Y)}} \&\& \textcolor{rgb,255:red,92;green,92;blue,214}{{HF(Y)}} \\
	\& \textcolor{rgb,255:red,214;green,92;blue,92}{{KG(Y)}} \&\& \textcolor{rgb,255:red,214;green,92;blue,92}{{KF(Y)}}
	\arrow["{\beta_{G(X)}}"', from=1-1, to=2-2]
	\arrow["{HG(f)}"', color={rgb,255:red,92;green,92;blue,214}, from=1-1, to=3-1]
	\arrow["{H(\alpha_X)}"', color={rgb,255:red,92;green,92;blue,214}, from=1-3, to=1-1]
	\arrow["{\beta_{F(X)}}", from=1-3, to=2-4]
	\arrow["{HF(f)}"'{pos=0.3}, color={rgb,255:red,92;green,92;blue,214}, from=1-3, to=3-3]
	\arrow["{KG(f)}"'{pos=0.3}, color={rgb,255:red,214;green,92;blue,92}, from=2-2, to=4-2]
	\arrow["{K(\alpha_X)}"'{pos=0.3}, color={rgb,255:red,214;green,92;blue,92}, from=2-4, to=2-2]
	\arrow["{KF(f)}"'{pos=0.3}, color={rgb,255:red,214;green,92;blue,92}, from=2-4, to=4-4]
	\arrow["{\beta_{G(Y)}}"', from=3-1, to=4-2]
	\arrow["{H(\alpha_Y)}"{pos=0.3}, color={rgb,255:red,92;green,92;blue,214}, from=3-3, to=3-1]
	\arrow["{\beta_{F(Y)}}", from=3-3, to=4-4]
	\arrow["{K(\alpha_Y)}", color={rgb,255:red,214;green,92;blue,92}, from=4-4, to=4-2]
\end{tikzcd}
\end{document}
